Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a", "" ] | union (datatable(s:string)[ "c" ] | extend s=tostring(dynamic(null))) | extend e=isempty(s), n=isnull(s) | project s, e, n
Sql: SELECT s, e, n FROM (SELECT *, (s IS NULL OR CAST(s AS VARCHAR) = '') AS e, (s IS NULL) AS n FROM ((SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('a'), ('')) AS t(s)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * EXCLUDE (s), TRY_CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS s FROM (VALUES ('c')) AS t(s))))
Detail: first differing row[2]: kusto=('', True, False) duck=(null, True, True)

Sql: SELECT s, REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d+)') AS "all", LIST_TRANSFORM(range(1, GREATEST(LEN(REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d)(\d)', 1)), LEN(REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d)(\d)', 2))) + 1), lambda i: [REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d)(\d)', 1)[i], REGEXP_EXTRACT_ALL(s, '@"(\d)(\d)', 2)[i]]) AS all2 FROM (VALUES ('2020-01-02 03:04'), ('a1b2c3d4'), ('nope')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(k:long, s:string)[ 1,"a", 1,"", 1,"b", 2,"", 2,"" ] | summarize ml=make_list(s), ms=make_set(s), joined=strcat_array(make_list(s), "|") by k | order by k asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COALESCE(LIST(s) FILTER (WHERE s IS NOT NULL), []) AS ml, COALESCE(LIST(DISTINCT s) FILTER (WHERE s IS NOT NULL), []) AS ms, ARRAY_TO_STRING(LIST(s) FILTER (WHERE s IS NOT NULL), '|') AS joined FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), ''), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), ''), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), '')) AS t(k, s) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: print d = dynamic([1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8]) | extend parts = array_split(d, dynamic([2,5])) | extend p0 = parts[0], p1 = parts[1], p2 = parts[2], np = array_length(parts)
Sql: SELECT *, parts[0 + 1] AS p0, parts[1 + 1] AS p1, parts[2 + 1] AS p2, LEN(parts) AS np FROM (SELECT *, LIST_TRANSFORM(range(0, LEN(LIST_TRANSFORM(LIST_VALUE(2, 5), x -> CAST(x AS BIGINT))) + 1), i -> LIST_SLICE(d, CASE WHEN i = 0 THEN 1 ELSE LIST_TRANSFORM(LIST_VALUE(2, 5), x -> CAST(x AS BIGINT))[i] + 1 END, CASE WHEN i = LEN(LIST_TRANSFORM(LIST_VALUE(2, 5), x -> CAST(x AS BIGINT))) THEN LEN(d) ELSE LIST_TRANSFORM(LIST_VALUE(2, 5), x -> CAST(x AS BIGINT))[i + 1] END)) AS parts FROM (SELECT LIST_VALUE(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8) AS d))

Kql: print d = dynamic([[1,2],[3,4],[5,6]]) | extend cols = array_concat(pack_array(d[0][0],d[1][0],d[2][0]), pack_array(d[0][1],d[1][1],d[2][1])) | extend colsum = array_sum(cols)
Sql: SELECT *, LIST_SUM(LIST_TRANSFORM(cols, x -> TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE))) AS colsum FROM (SELECT *, LIST_CONCAT(LIST_VALUE(d[0 + 1][0 + 1], d[1 + 1][0 + 1], d[2 + 1][0 + 1]), LIST_VALUE(d[0 + 1][1 + 1], d[1 + 1][1 + 1], d[2 + 1][1 + 1])) AS cols FROM (SELECT '[[1,2],[3,4],[5,6]]'::JSON AS d))

Kql: datatable(d:dynamic)[ dynamic({"type":"A","v":1}), dynamic({"type":"B","v":2}), dynamic({"type":"A","v":3}) ] | evaluate bag_unpack(d) | summarize sum(v) by type | sort by type asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT type, COALESCE(SUM(TRY_CAST(v AS DOUBLE)), 0) AS sum_v FROM (SELECT * EXCLUDE (d), d->>'$.type' AS type, d->>'$.v' AS v FROM (SELECT CAST(d AS JSON) AS d FROM (VALUES (CAST('{"type":"A","v":1}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST('{"type":"B","v":2}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST('{"type":"A","v":3}'::JSON AS JSON))) AS t(d))) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY type ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: print d = dynamic({"matrix":[[1,2,3],[4,5,6]]}) | mv-apply row = d.matrix on (extend rs = array_sum(row)) | summarize total = sum(rs)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(rs), 0) AS total FROM (SELECT t.*, _sub.* FROM (SELECT '{"matrix":[[1,2,3],[4,5,6]]}'::JSON AS d) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(CASE WHEN json_extract(d, '$.matrix') IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(json_extract(d, '$.matrix')) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(json_extract(d, '$.matrix') AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(json_extract(d, '$.matrix')) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(json_extract(d, '$.matrix')), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.matrix'), '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([json_extract(d, '$.matrix')] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value), LATERAL (SELECT *, LIST_SUM(LIST_TRANSFORM(json_extract(CAST(row AS JSON), '$[*]'), x -> TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE))) AS rs FROM (SELECT u.value AS row)) AS _sub)

Kql: datatable(i:int)[ 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 ] | extend grp = i % 2 | partition by grp (summarize s = sum(i) | extend tag = "p") | sort by s asc
Sql: SELECT *, 'p' AS tag FROM (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(i), 0) AS s FROM (SELECT *, (((i) % NULLIF(2, 0)) + ABS(2)) % NULLIF(2, 0) AS grp FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3), (4), (5), (6)) AS t(i))) ORDER BY s ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(t:long, v:long)[ 2,20, 4,40, 6,60 ] | make-series s = sum(v) default = -7 on t from 1 to 8 step 1 | mv-expand idx = range(0, array_length(s)-1, 1) to typeof(long), s to typeof(long) | sort by idx asc
Sql: SELECT t.* EXCLUDE (s), CAST(u.v0 AS BIGINT) AS idx, CAST(u.v1 AS BIGINT) AS s FROM (SELECT LIST(COALESCE(s_val, (-7)) ORDER BY _ts) AS s, LIST(_axis._ts ORDER BY _axis._ts) AS t FROM (SELECT (1) + _i*(1) AS _ts FROM range(0, CAST(CEIL(((8) - (1))/(1)) AS BIGINT)) AS _r(_i)) AS _axis LEFT JOIN (SELECT ((1) + FLOOR(((t) - (1))/(1))*(1)) AS _bucket, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS DOUBLE) AS s_val FROM (VALUES (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), CAST(40 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(6 AS BIGINT), CAST(60 AS BIGINT))) AS t(t, v) GROUP BY _bucket) AS _data ON _axis._ts = _data._bucket) AS t, LATERAL (SELECT UNNEST(GENERATE_SERIES(0, LEN(s) - 1, 1)) AS v0, UNNEST(t.s) AS v1) AS u ORDER BY idx ASC NULLS FIRST
